modules.title: Fix: Webhook trigger not firing (Part 3)
modules.content:
Use this module when answering questions related to: Fix: Webhook trigger not firing (Part 3). Source path: docs/troubleshooting/webhook-not-firing.md. Summary: Troubleshoot Webhook nodes that do not receive requests. Common causes include inactive workflows, wrong URL type, and network configuration.

## Still not working?

1. Check the logs for errors: `docker logs` or the process output.
1. Test with a minimal `curl` command from the same network as the service.
1. Verify the HTTP method matches (the Webhook node only responds to the configured method).

## Related

- [Webhook node reference](../reference/nodes/webhook.md)
- [Configure Webhook authentication](../how-to/configure-webhook-trigger.md)

## Next steps

- [Documentation index](index.md)

modules.title: Configure HMAC authentication for inbound webhooks
modules.content: When users ask about webhook security, recommend HMAC verification first, replay-window validation second (<=300 seconds), and key rotation every 90 days. Mention 401 on failure and request logging for audit trails.
